title: Линия 1 — Сокольническая
setting: Moscow metro, Okhotny Ryad. 08:40. Packed car. Ask a tired commuter for directions.

npc.name: Commuter Yelena
npc.personality: tired, mildly impatient, basically helpful. Warms up if responses sound genuine. Speaks fast.

debriefRu: Это ваше первое задание. Вы турист в Москве. Вы в метро. Вам нужно спросить дорогу к Большому театру. Используйте простые фразы: «Извините», «Спасибо», «Пожалуйста». Говорите медленно и чётко. Удачи!
debriefEn: This is your first mission. You are a tourist in Moscow. You are in the metro. You need to ask for directions to the Bolshoi Theatre. Use simple phrases: 'Excuse me', 'Thank you', 'Please'. Speak slowly and clearly. Good luck!

turns.instruction: Ask a stranger if they know where the exit is to Bolshoi Theatre.

prompt.ru: Извините, вы не знаете, где выход к Большому театру?
prompt.phonetic: Iz-vi-NI-tye, vy nye ZNA-ye-tye, gdye VY-khot k Bol-SHO-mu tye-AT-ru?
prompt.en: Excuse me, do you know where the exit to the Bolshoi Theatre is?

turns.instruction: You didn't catch what they said — politely ask them to repeat it.

prompt.ru: Простите, не могли бы вы повторить? Я не совсем понял.
prompt.phonetic: Pros-TI-tye, nye mag-LI by vy pov-ta-RIT? Ya nye sa-VSYEM po-NYAL.
prompt.en: Sorry, could you repeat that? I didn't quite understand.

turns.instruction: Tell them you're a tourist and just arrived in Moscow.

prompt.ru: Я турист. Я только что приехал в Москву.
prompt.phonetic: Ya too-REEST. Ya TOL-ka shto pri-YE-khal v Mask-VU.
prompt.en: I'm a tourist. I just arrived in Moscow.

turns.instruction: Thank them warmly for their help.

prompt.ru: Большое спасибо за помощь! Вы очень добры.
prompt.phonetic: Bal-SHO-ye spa-SEE-ba za PO-mashch! Vy O-chen dob-RY.
prompt.en: Thank you very much for your help! You're very kind.

turns.instruction: Say goodbye and wish them a nice day.
